# Vetrux CBD — CBD Raw Materials & Botanical Extract Manufacturer

> Vetrux CBD is the commercial brand of Vetrux Biotechnology (Chuxiong) Co., Ltd. (蔚萃生物科技（楚雄）有限公司), a vertically integrated CBD isolate manufacturer and botanical extract supplier based in Chuxiong, Yunnan Province, China.

## What We Do
Vetrux provides CBD raw material sales, OEM/ODM services, technical consulting on cultivation and extraction, and other botanical extract products. We operate a seed-to-isolate production chain from our Chuxiong, Yunnan facility.

## Core Product: CBD Isolate
- Purity: ≥99.5% (HPLC verified)
- THC: Non-detect (ND)
- CAS Number: 13956-29-1
- HS Code: 2907299020
- Molecular Formula: C₂₁H₃₀O₂ (314.46 g/mol)
- Appearance: White crystalline powder
- Extraction: Ethanol extraction + chromatographic purification
- Packaging: 5 kg PE bags (27×60cm, food grade), 5 kg aluminum foil bags (35×50cm, food grade), export cartons (465×285×295mm, 2 bags/carton)
- Certifications: ISO 9001, GMP, HACCP

## Other Botanical Extracts
- Anthocyanins
- Steviol Glycosides
- Hemp Seed Globulin
Applications: pharmaceutical R&D, nutrition & health, food & beverage, functional formulations, personal care

## Core Business Lines
1. CBD Raw Material Sales: Stable, traceable CBD isolate for brand clients, channel partners, and trading companies
2. OEM/ODM Services: Raw material support, formulation development, production, packaging design, and finished product delivery
3. Technical Consulting: Cultivation management, yield & content optimization, extraction process optimization, cost control, cannabinoid extraction consulting
4. Botanical Extract Sales: Anthocyanins, steviol glycosides, hemp seed globulin

## Manufacturing Capabilities
- 20 sets of 6m³ multi-function extraction tanks
- 26 sets of 700L chromatography columns
- 10 sets of 2000L/h single/double-effect concentrators
- 2 sets of 1000-type solvent recovery towers
- 10 sets of 5m³ ethanol recovery storage tanks
- HPLC analytical system (Thermo Scientific Dionex UltiMate 3000)
- Explosion-proof Siemens HMI automation control
- Automatic residue discharge system

## Quality & Compliance
- ISO 9001, GMP, HACCP certified manufacturing
- HPLC testing for CBD purity verification on every batch
- COA, SDS, test reports, commercial invoices, and packing lists provided per batch
- Export compliance support available; destination country import compliance is buyer/importer responsibility
- Product labels, usage declarations, and customs descriptions should match actual batch, order purpose, and destination country requirements

## Vertical Integration
- In-house hemp cultivation and breeding center in Chuxiong, Yunnan Province
- High-altitude (1,800m+), UV-rich growing conditions
- Seed selection, clonal propagation, greenhouse cultivation
- Full seed-to-isolate traceability

## Shipping & Logistics
- FOB Kunming/Chuxiong, CIF, DDP available
- Standard lead time: 10–14 business days
- Packaging: 5 kg PE bags, 5 kg aluminum foil bags, export cartons on plastic pallets with shrink wrap
